members.name: moelle
members.description: As a kid, I discovered a game on an Actimel package. I can't remember if it was web-based or if I eventually got my hands on a CD (this image is just a placeholder for all Actimel games ;) ). I never actually understood the point of the game, so I usually got stuck on the first level. The only thing I could do was swim around in a pool shaped like the Danone logo, which had a red tail forming an island in the middle. I spent hours doing just that. I haven't seen the game since, and it’s nowhere to be found on the web anymore.
